label: Data collection, curation & filtering

node.label: Data collection, curation & filtering
node.definition: Data curation collects, filters, balances, labels, documents, and governs examples so the training distribution better matches intended capabilities and risks.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Data collection, curation & filtering is modeled as depending on Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval and feeding downstream nodes such as Deduplication, contamination control & provenance, Large-scale pretraining, Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules.

limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval.
